targets.query: from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -2m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_cpu" and r._field == "cpu_used_pct" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> last()
from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -2m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_memory" and r._field == "ram_used_pct" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> last()
from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -2m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_load" and r._field == "load1" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> last()
from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -2m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_status" and r._field == "critical_count" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> last()
from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -2m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_network" and r._field == "net_received_kbps" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> last()
from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -2m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_network" and r._field == "net_sent_kbps" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> last()

from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_cpu" and r.node_name == "${node}" and (r._field == "cpu_user_pct" or r._field == "cpu_system_pct" or r._field == "cpu_iowait_pct" or r._field == "cpu_softirq_pct" or r._field == "cpu_steal_pct")) |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_memory" and r.node_name == "${node}" and (r._field == "ram_used_mb" or r._field == "ram_cached_mb" or r._field == "ram_buffers_mb" or r._field == "ram_free_mb")) |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_network" and r._field == "net_received_kbps" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_network" and r._field == "net_sent_kbps" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * -1.0})) |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_disk_io" and r._field == "io_reads_kbs" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_disk_io" and r._field == "io_writes_kbs" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * -1.0})) |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_load" and r._field == "load1" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_load" and r._field == "load5" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_load" and r._field == "load15" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -2m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_disk_space" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> last() |> pivot(rowKey: ["mountpoint"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

message: Updated node detail with full CPU/RAM/net/disk/load metrics
